title: SuperSoil - Soil DNA Extraction
author: Jie Hao Ou
materials: Add following materials to 1.8 ml centrifuge tube 250 mg soil 1.5 g Bead 800 µl SD1

steps.title: Vortex for 00:10:00 at max speed...
steps.instruction: Vortex for 00:10:00 at max speed Vortex horizontally and ensure the cap is tightly sealed

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 1.5 ml or 2 ml tube Expect 500–600 µl

steps.title: Add 200 ul SD2 White precipitate forms
steps.instruction: Add 200 ul SD2 White precipitate forms. If too much AlCl3 (SD2) is added, it will cause all the DNA to be precipitated along with the inhibitory substances. See Mustafa (2017) for more info. Irfan Mustafa, Hadiatullah and Sustiyah (2017). Removal of humic acid from peat soils by using AlCl3 prior to DNA extraction. AIP Conference Proceedings. http://doi.org/10.1063/1.4983434

steps.title: 14000 rpm, , 1 minute Don't...
steps.instruction: 14000 rpm, , 1 minute Don't worry if the supernatant is yellow.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 1.5 ml or 2 ml tube Expect 500–600 µl

steps.title: Transfer 650 ul lysate to spin column
steps.instruction: Transfer 650 ul lysate to spin column

steps.title: Transfer remaining lysate to spin column
steps.instruction: Transfer remaining lysate to spin column

steps.title: Add 500 ul SEA to spin column
steps.instruction: Add 500 ul SEA to spin column

steps.title: 14000 rpm, °C, 1 minute, Centrifuge...
steps.instruction: 14000 rpm, °C, 1 minute, Centrifuge again to remove remaining ethanol (S5) , discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 500 ul S5 to spin column
steps.instruction: Add 500 ul S5 to spin column
